name: Athena Rossi
title: Master Nail Artist
bio: With over 10 years of experience, Athena specializes in intricate nail art and custom acrylic sculpting.

name: Chloe Kim
title: Gel Polish Specialist
bio: Chloe brings the latest Korean gel trends to Hercules Nails. Expect flawless, long-lasting finishes.

name: Marcus Sterling
title: Pedicure Expert
bio: Marcus is our resident foot-care guru, delivering unparalleled relaxation with our Hercules Spa Pedicure.
